# dokku_redis_link (Resource)

Links a Dokku redis service to an app (`dokku redis:link`).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String)
- `service` (String)

### Optional

- `alias` (String) Optional env var alias prefix for the link (e.g. "DB1" yields DB1_URL instead of the plugin default).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
